data.biography:
周历杰，1997年7月6日出生于浙江温州，中国内地男演员。

2019年4月，周历杰主演电视剧《冰糖炖雪梨》，剧中饰演喻言。
data.name: 周历杰

data.biography:
周曆傑，1997 年 7 月 6 日出生於浙江温州，中國內地男演員。

2019 年 4 月，周曆傑主演電視劇《冰糖燉悉尼》，劇中飾演喻言。
data.name: 周曆傑

data.biography: Froylan Gutierrez (born April 27, 1998) is an American actor and singer, known for playing Nolan Holloway in Teen Wolf and Jamie Henson in Cruel Summer. He is also known for playing Ryan, in the first chapter of Lionsgate horror remake trilogy, The Strangers: Chapter 1 (2024).
data.name: Froy Gutierrez

data.biography: Froy Gutierrez nació y se crió en Dallas, Texas. Asiste a Booker T. Washington High School for the Performing and Visual Arts donde estudia teatro. Después de que un agente lo vio en una obra de teatro local, comenzó a enviar cintas de audición en el verano de 2015. Es mejor conocido por su papel de Charlie en Bella And The Bulldogs (2015).

Il est un compositeur japonais de musiques de films. Il a également été acteur, par exemple dans "Swallowtail and Butterfly". Il a plus d'une corde à son arc en tant qu' auteur-compositeur-interprète, musicien, guitariste, réalisateur artistique.
Dior Goodjohn was born on 13 August 2006 in Santa Monica, California, USA. She is an actress, known for Are You Afraid of the Dark? (2019), Percy Jackson and the Olympians (2023) and Glee (2009).
data.name: Dior Goodjohn
アントニオ・タグーバ

data.biography: Piolo Pascual (born Piolo Jose Nonato Pascual on 12 January 1977) is a Filipino actor, recording artist, producer, and television personality. He is best known for his roles in the films Dekada '70 (2003), Milan (2005), Don't Give Up On Us (2007), On The Job (2013), Starting Over Again (2015), A Lullaby to the Sorrowful Mystery (2016), Season of the Devil (2018), The Halt (2019), GomBurZa (2023), Mallari (2023), The Kingdom (2024), and Meet, Greet & Bye (2025), among others.
data.name: Piolo Pascual

data.biography: Bunny Levine has had a passion for entertaining from her earliest memory. At the age of two, she subjected all her relatives to her rendition of the song "When I Grow Too Old to Dream" at every possible opportunity. Playing with her sister and friends in pre-school days, her favorite game was a simulation of the performances of the current Hollywood stars, replete with screams and fainting, in the mode of the times. Her greatest regret was that she, unlike her contemporary Shirley Temple, had not been discovered in dance class. By third grade she wrote, directed and starred in the epic, "Debbie's Diary." A year or so later, with increased maturity, she limited her contributions to no more than two of the three elements. All through elementary school and high school, she played either the lead or a character role in school and local productions. Transferring colleges on her marriage after sophomore year made her rethink the wisdom of a short, young, character woman gaining fame and fortune in the field, so she switched majors from Theater Arts, but continued to act, and to work on the college radio station. Already pregnant upon graduation, she put her acting aspirations on the back burner for 25 years, working primarily as a school librarian, to help her underpaid college professor husband raise their three children. Storytelling and book talks helped fill her performing aspirations. Foolishly, she would not participate in community theater, thinking of herself as too much of a professional. Upon early retirement, she began taking acting classes, going on auditions, and gradually immersing herself totally in the fabulous, mad world of acting. Soon she was a member of all the unions and began booking commercials, roles on soaps and episodics, as well as films. Upon her beloved husband, Bernie's, death, she moved from the New York area to the LA market, and continued studying, booking, and striving. Among her credits are Law & Order (1990), The Jimmy Show (2001), Everybody Loves Raymond (1996), _Gilmore Girls_, the soon-to-be-released Charles Busch film, and Las Vegas (2003). She considers herself the most energetic and agile septuagenarian in the field and the oldest living student (her philosophy being that you can never stop learning and exercising the acting muscle).
data.name: Bunny Levine
塞巴斯蒂安·乌泽多夫斯基

data.overview: Loạt phim tài liệu này khám phá cuộc đời và sự nghiệp của vua paparazzi Fabrizio Corona, đồng thời phản ánh lịch sử gần đây của Ý qua những bê bối và thay đổi trong xã hội.

data.biography: Aoi Yuki (悠木 碧, Yūki Aoi, born March 27, 1992) is a Japanese voice actress (seiyuu), actress and singer from Sanmu City, Chiba Prefecture. She is affiliated with Aoni Production. Her real name and former stage name is Aoi Yabusaki (八武 崎碧, Yabusaki Aoi). She was previously affiliated with Breath and Pro Fit.
data.name: Aoi Yuuki

data.biography: Aoi Yuki est une actrice, chanteuse et seiyū (doubleuse) japonaise.
data.name: Aoi Yūki

data.biography:
悠木碧是日本的女性声优、歌手和演员。

拥有明亮的中高音，擅长出演任性少女和低燃少女和傲娇妹妹，但仍可以出演具有优等生、大小姐、无口女、幼女、热血笨蛋、正太、少年矮小的老奶奶，甚至是病娇、变态等属性的角色。

名字记“八武崎碧”。
data.name: 悠木碧

data.biography: 悠木碧是日本的女性聲優、歌手、前童星，本名為八武崎碧，二人聲優團體 petit milady 的成員。出身於千葉縣，所屬公司為青二製作。
data.name: 悠木碧

data.biography: Aoi Yuki (悠木 碧, Yūki  Aoi, 27 de marzo de 1992) es actriz de voz (seiyuu), actriz, cantante y talento japonesa de la ciudad de Sanmu, prefectura de Chiba. Pertenece a Aoni Production. Su nombre real y antiguo nombre artístico es Aoi Yabusaki (八武崎 碧, Yabusaki Aoi). Anteriormente estuvo afiliada a Breath y Pro Fit.
data.name: Aoi Yuki

data.biography: Aoi Yuki (悠木 碧, Yūki Aoi) è una doppiatrice giapponese (seiyuu), attrice e cantante nata il 27 marzo 1992 nella città di Sanmu, prefettura di Chiba. È affiliata alla Aoni Production. Il suo vero nome e precedente nome d'arte è Aoi Yabusaki (八武 崎碧, Yabusaki Aoi). In precedenza è stata affiliata a Breath e Pro Fit.

data.biography: Аой Юкі (яп. 悠木碧, Юкі Аой, нар. 27 березня 1992) — японська сейю. Справжнє ім'я — Аой Ябусакі (яп. 八武崎碧, Ябусакі Аой). У 2012-му році виграла Seiyu Awards у номінації на найкращу актрису в головній ролі.

data.biography:
Elizabeth Anne Greene (born May 1, 2003) is an American actress, known for her titular role as Dawn Harper in the Nickelodeon sitcom Nicky, Ricky, Dicky & Dawn from 2014 to 2018. She has starred as Sophie Dixon in the ABC family drama A Million Little Things from 2018 to 2023.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Lizzy Greene, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Lizzy Greene

data.biography: Lizzy Greene (ur. 1 maja 2003) – amerykańska aktorka, najbardziej znana z roli Dawn Harper w serialu Nicky, Ricky, Dicky i Dawn (2014–2018) na kanale Nickelodeon.

Mark Addy (born 14 January 1964) is an English actor. He is known for varied roles in British television, including Detective Constable Gary Boyle in the sitcom The Thin Blue Line (1995–1996), Hercules in the fantasy drama series Atlantis (2013–2015), and King Robert Baratheon on the first season of Game of Thrones (2011).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

data.biography: Rainbow Ching Hor Wai (Chinese: 程可為, born 10 October 1951) is a Hong Kong actress.
data.name: Rainbow Ching

data.biography:
程可為，原名程可為，人稱「程可為」，香港出生；無綫電視早期的二線女演員，曾是電視台旗下力捧的花旦之一。

她參加了 1971 至 1972 年度第 1 期無綫電視藝員訓練班，與甘國亮、許紹雄、金興賢、呂有慧等人為同學。「程可為」一藝名是她本人在訓練班時期所改，寓意「將來的前程樣樣都可以有所作為」。畢業後加入無綫電視。她擁有多年的演出經驗，演出不少大獲好評的角色。凴《紫禁驚雷》內飾演的「孝莊文皇后」獲得當年的萬千星輝頒獎典禮「最佳女配角」提名。她於 2021 年在無綫轉為「一年一騷」合約。
data.name: 程可為

data.biography: Mark Jiruntanin Trairattanayon is a Thai actor under GMMTV. He graduated from Sarasas Witaed Saimai School, and later got his degree in industrial engineering at Sirindhorn International Institute of Technology, an institute within Thammasat University.
data.name: Jiruntanin Trairattanayon
จิรันธนิน ตรัยรัตนยนต์

data.biography: 小名 Mark，全名為 Jiruntanin Trairattanayon（吉朗塔寧·歹拉塔納永），GMMTV旗下男演員，畢業於泰國國立法政大學。

Ronnie Zabala Lazaro is a Filipino film and television actor, producer, casting director, and art director. He won the Gawad Urian for Best Actor for Yanggaw. He has received many nominations throughout his career as an actor, nine of which were for Best Supporting Actor, and two for Best Actor (Ebolusyon in 2005 and Boatman in 1984). His films received recognition not only in the Philippines but also in international film festivals such as Cannes, Berlin and Hong Kong. Aside from his work as a film, theatre and television actor, Lazaro has had his share of achievements behind the camera. His art direction in Manila by Night won the Best Production Design Award in 1981.
data.name: Ronnie Lazaro

ザムエル・フィンツィ

data.biography: Janelle James is an American comedian, actress, and writer. She is best known for her role as Ava Coleman in the ABC television series Abbott Elementary, for which she won a Screen Actors Guild Award, and an NAACP Image Award, in addition to nominations for three Primetime Emmy Awards, and a Golden Globe Award.
data.name: Janelle James

data.biography:
James stammt ursprünglich von den Amerikanischen Jungferninseln. Sie wuchs als ältestes von neun Kindern auf. In ihrer Heimat betrieb ihr Vater ein Restaurant sowie einen Food Truck, in dem James bereits als Siebenjährige arbeitete.

Im Alter von 16 Jahren verlegte sie ihren Wohnort auf das Festland der USA. Sie wohnte zunächst mit ihrer Mutter in Maryland, lebte danach 15 Jahre in New York und wohnte anschließend in Illinois. Nach der Ausstrahlung der 1. Staffel von Abbott Elementary im Jahr 2021 verlegte James teilweise ihren Wohnort nach Los Angeles. Sie lebt seitdem gleichermaßen in New York und Los Angeles.

Vor ihrer beruflichen Karriere im Bereich Comedy studierte James Modedesign am Fashion Institute of Technology in New York, beendete ihr Studium dort aber nicht. Während ihrer Zeit an der Hochschule gründete sie den Essenslieferservice „Joy of Not Cooking“ und arbeitete u. a. als Partyorganisatorin für eine PR-Firma für Mode.

James ist Mutter zweier Söhne.
data.name: Janelle James
ジャネル・ジェームズ

data.biography: Die Österreicherin Andrea Guo wurde 2000 in Hollabrunn geboren und verbrachte ihre ersten Lebensjahre in der Steiermark, bevor sie mit ihren Eltern, die in den 1990er Jahren aus dem chinesischen Qingtian nach Europa kamen, nach Bayern umzog. 2014 wohnte sie eine Zeit lang in Wien und verbrachte 2017 ein halbes Jahr in den USA. Gleich im Anschluss begann Andrea Guo in Köln an der privat geführten Film Acting School ihr Schauspielstudium, das sie als Jüngste ihrer Klasse 2019 erfolgreich abschloss. Schon während ihres Studiums konnte man sie im Kölner Metropol-Theater in Schneewittchen, kein Kindermärchen und im Burg Satzvey-Theater in Die Schneekönigin auf der Bühne sehen. Ihren Professor der Filmacting School begleitete sie als Regieassistentin im Sommer 2019 zu einem Kindertheater-Projekt mit den Stücken Alice im Wunderland und Schneewittchen an die HSH Drama School in China.

data.overview: Ca trực đầu tiên trong phòng lạnh của nhà xác tưởng chừng yên ả, nhưng với một nhân viên bảo vệ kiệt sức vừa được điều chuyển tới đây, đêm ấy lại mở ra cơn ác mộng không lối thoát. Những hành lang dài hun hút, ánh đèn chập chờn và tiếng động mơ hồ giữa các ngăn chứa xác dần khiến anh nghi ngờ chính cảm giác của mình. Dường như có điều gì đó vẫn còn sống – hoặc chưa từng rời đi – ẩn trong bóng tối ấy. Khi kim đồng hồ trôi qua từng giờ, ranh giới giữa thực tại và ảo giác bắt đầu tan biến, và anh nhận ra có những tội lỗi không thể chôn vùi, dù sau cánh cửa thép lạnh lẽo của nhà xác.
data.title: Ca Trực Kinh Hoàng
